---
title: "Living Lab Dashboards"
date: "2024-09-01"
categories: [dashboard, visualization, living labs]
description: "Interactive dashboards for monitoring and analyzing living lab experiments across multiple sites in the landscape research network."
---

The Living Lab Dashboards project develops interactive web-based tools for visualizing
and exploring data from living lab experiments conducted across our research network.

These dashboards integrate diverse data streams including environmental sensors, field
observations, and remote sensing data to provide real-time insights into landscape
dynamics and experimental outcomes.

The platform supports collaborative analysis and data-driven decision making for
adaptive management of living lab sites.
